theme_and_archetype.reasoning: High-contrast is mandatory for low-literacy and emergency night use. Deep purple provides a calming night-mode base, pure white offers maximum legibility, and screaming red triggers immediate psychological urgency during SOS.

layout_and_spacing.philosophy: Bottom-heavy, thumb-friendly. Everything critical must be reachable with one hand.
layout_and_spacing.scale: Generous (p-6, p-8) for readability. Giant tap targets.
layout_and_spacing.sos_button: Must occupy ~30% of screen height (e.g., h-[30vh]). Fixed at the bottom center, styled as a massive rounded rectangle or pill to prevent accidental misses.
layout_and_spacing.map_view: Full screen behind the UI (`absolute inset-0`). UI elements should sit on top as floating cards or bottom sheets with glassmorphism to show map context.

components_strategy.forms_and_onboarding: Shadcn UI, modified for extreme contrast. Huge inputs (h-14). No tiny helper text.
components_strategy.navigation: Floating bottom bar, hiding when SOS is active.
components_strategy.sos_trigger: Press-and-hold (3 seconds) with circular progress fill OR shake gesture (implemented via logic).
components_strategy.discreet_mode: Mock music player UI. Real album art. Play/pause buttons actually act as status checks or hidden triggers.

icons.style: Stroke width 2.5 or 3 for maximum visibility. Large sizes (w-8 h-8 minimum for tap targets).

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a mobile-first web app mimicking a React Expo mobile layout.
Implement the 'Walking Mode' dashboard with a full-screen map background.
The SOS Button MUST be ~30% of the viewport height (e.g., `h-[30vh]`) and prominent in Red. Placed at the bottom for easy thumb access.
Implement the SOS active state: pulsing red background, 10-sec cancel countdown, list of incoming volunteers with ETAs.
Implement Discreet Mode: A fake music player overlay using the provided album art.
Use deep purple (#1A0B2E) for the normal dark mode background, and pure white for text/cards to ensure high contrast night use.
Ensure all buttons and interactive elements have `data-testid` attributes.
